title: rhus glutinosa subsp. neoglutinosa
intro: Rhus glutinosa subsp. neoglutinosa, also known as the Chinese sumac, is a plant species in the Anacardiaceae family, native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rhus glutinosa subsp. neoglutinosa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Rhus glutinosa subsp. neoglutinosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
